noEntities: No entities detected in this chapter

genre.title: Genre Groups
genre.empty_list: No genres yet. Create one to organize glossary attributes by genre.
genre.create_to_start: Create a genre to get started
genre.no_kinds_tagged: No kinds are tagged with "{{name}}" yet.
genre.tag_hint: To tag/untag a kind, go to Kinds & Attributes → Genres row.
genre.no_attrs_scoped: No attributes are scoped to "{{name}}" yet.
genre.scope_hint: To scope an attribute to a genre, edit the attribute in Kinds & Attributes tab.
genre.delete_desc: Delete "{{name}}"? This will not delete any entities or attributes — it only removes the genre group definition.
genre.color_hint: Used in badges, filter chips, and genre tag pills
genre.desc_placeholder: Brief note about what this genre covers...

ai_suggestions.title: AI Suggestions
ai_suggestions.intro: These entities were discovered by AI extraction across your book but aren't in your glossary yet. Promote the ones worth keeping; reject the rest — a rejected name won't be suggested again.
ai_suggestions.empty_desc: When extraction finds entities not yet in your glossary, they'll appear here for review.

merge_candidates.title: Merge Candidates
merge_candidates.intro: AI found these entities that may be the same character under different names (e.g. 姜子牙 / 太公望 / 子牙). Pick the name to keep as canonical and merge — or dismiss if they're actually different. A merge is reversible.
merge_candidates.empty_desc: When detection finds entities that look like duplicates, they'll appear here for review.
merge_candidates.winner_label: Keep one as canonical; the rest fold into it as aliases:
merge_candidates.toast_none: No entities were merged (they may have changed)

unknown.title: Unknown Kinds
unknown.intro: These entities arrived from extraction with a kind that doesn't exist in your taxonomy yet, so they were parked here instead of being dropped. Resolve each one by mapping it to an existing kind (optionally as a reusable alias) or by creating a new kind for it.
unknown.empty_desc: Every extracted entity resolved to a known kind. New unknowns will show up here.
unknown.truncated: Showing the first {{shown}} of {{total}} — resolve some to load more.
unknown.new_kind_code_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only. Used as the stable identifier.
unknown.merge_all: Apply to all {{count}} entities that arrived as "{{code}}"
unknown.merge_all_hint: Creates a reusable alias so future extractions with this code resolve automatically.
unknown.err_code_format: Code must be lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only

history.title: Version history
history.restore_confirm_desc: Restore the entity to revision #{{num}}. The current state is saved as a new revision, so this is reversible.
